_publications._publicationTitle: Perspectives of Patients and Providers on Chronic Pain Assessment in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1): A Qualitative Study.

_contextSnippet: Participants estimated their average pain during the previous two weeks to be moderate to severe, but lower at the time of assessment...BPI-SF Past 2 weeks 4.8 (1.8) At the time of the interview 3.7 (2.9)
details: Used to assess pain levels in NF1 patients with mean scores of 4.8 (SD 1.8) for past 2 weeks and 3.7 (SD 2.9) at time of interview
